stories.title: Isa Torres — Day 4 Uncommitted, Texas and A&M Still Pursuing

x_posts.label: Post 1-1
x_posts.text:
Day 4 of the portal window.

Isa Torres — .530 BA, D1 Player of the Year — still hasn't committed.

11 days left. Texas and Texas A&M are waiting. The most important recruiting decision in college softball is still wide open.

#SoftballPortal #ILoveSoftball

x_posts.label: Post 1-2
x_posts.text:
Wherever Isa Torres lands wins the portal.

.530/.978/.591. 78 runs. One year of eligibility. Programs have been chasing her since June 8.

She hasn't said yes yet. That window closes June 22.

#SoftballPortal #ILoveSoftball

article.headline: Isa Torres Portal Day 4 — Texas and A&M Still in Pursuit as Window Narrows

image_concepts.label: Image
image_concepts.raw:

stories.title: Jaysoni Beachum — FSU Outfielder's Portal Status Heats Up

x_posts.label: Post 2-1
x_posts.text:
Don't sleep on Jaysoni Beachum.

The FSU outfielder hit .417 with 16 HRs and 66 RBIs in 2026 — and she's still in the portal.

Torres gets the headlines. Beachum brings the power. One program is about to land both.

#SoftballPortal #ILoveSoftball

x_posts.label: Post 2-2
x_posts.text:
.417 average. 16 home runs. 66 RBIs.

Jaysoni Beachum is one of the best power bats available in this portal class — and she's still uncommitted on Day 4.

The programs that miss on Torres may be pivoting hard toward Beachum right now.

#SoftballPortal #ILoveSoftball

article.headline: Jaysoni Beachum in the Portal — FSU's Power Bat Is One of the Best Available

stories.title: Moriah Polar — Day 4, .555 Hitter Still in the Portal

x_posts.label: Post 3
x_posts.text:
The nation's leading hitter is still available.

Moriah Polar: .555 BA, 101 hits, 2nd-team All-American. Day 4 of the portal window. No commitment yet.

You don't find a bat like this in the portal often. Whoever signs her just upgraded.

#SoftballPortal #ILoveSoftball

article.headline: Moriah Polar — The Nation's Best Hitter Is Still in the Portal on Day 4

stories.title: Samantha Swan — Texas Visit Follow-Up, Commitment Watch

x_posts.label: Post 4
x_posts.text:
Samantha Swan visited Texas on Monday.

All-Big 12 catcher. .383 average. 12 HRs. From Georgetown, TX.

Texas needs a catcher after Reese Atwood graduated. Swan checks every box.

Is a commitment coming? #LonghornSoftball #ILoveSoftball

article.headline: Samantha Swan Visited Texas — The Catcher Commitment Watch Is On

stories.title: Texas Staff Search — White Must Fill Two Vacancies Before Fall

x_posts.label: Post 5
x_posts.text:
Texas has two open coaching spots and 11 days left in the portal.

Earleywine is in Tennessee. Zaleski is gone. White must replace both before fall.

Kavan and Stewart are returning. Now he needs coaches.

#LonghornSoftball #ILoveSoftball

article.headline: Texas Has Two Coaching Vacancies — The Dynasty's Three-Peat Bid Requires Getting This Right
